titleStmt.title: SII 7.748: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 748. (A.R. No. 124 of 1902). IN THE SAME PLACE.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti ≈õrƒ´ . p≈´miyu n=ti ruvum tƒÅme pu·πáara vikkiramattƒÅl cakkara na·π≠ƒÅtti virasi·πÅ- hƒÅsa nattu vi·πü·πüirun=ta ru·∏∑iya kopparakecaripanma rƒÅ·πâa U·π≠aiyƒÅr ≈õrƒ´rƒÅjentra- co·∏ªateva·πüku yƒÅ·πá·π≠u ƒÄvatuThe date may be read as 5ƒÄvatu.
·πüƒÅjentra co·∏ªava·∏∑anƒÅ·π≠·π≠up pavittiramƒÅ·πáikkava·∏∑anƒÅ·π≠·π≠ut tiruppƒÅtirippuliy≈´rƒÅna paranirupaparƒÅkkiramacaturvvetima·πÖkalattil sabhai yom In=ta sabhai kkuc camain tu ƒÄ·πüƒÅnti kumaran viranƒÅrƒÅya·πáan pirƒÅn=ta katevanum Ikku·π≠i mƒÅtevan nampirƒÅ nampiyum Ikku·π≠ic cen=ta n nƒÅrƒÅ
ya·πáanum pƒÅrattuvƒÅji cen=ta n mƒÅ·πüanum Ikku·π≠it tiruve nƒÅrƒÅya·πáanum rƒÅtitaran ponnƒÅ·∏ªi tattapa·π≠·π≠a·πâum rƒÅtitaran ≈õrƒ´k·πõ ·π£·πáan mƒÅlarikecuvanum pƒÅrattuvƒÅji nƒÅrƒÅya·πáan Anan=ta nƒÅrƒÅya·πáanum U·∏∑·∏∑i·π≠·π≠a sabhai yom vecƒÅlip piramateyatti lirukkum ku·π≠ippa·∏∑·∏∑i
p perumƒÅ·πâ Ira·πá·π≠ƒÅyiravanƒÅ·πâa se nƒÅpati rƒÅjentra co·∏ªa vecƒÅlipperaiyan ƒÄkamu·π≠aiyƒÅ·∏∑ cƒÅttan pirattƒÅlikku nƒÅ·πÖka·∏∑ vi·πü·πüukku·π≠utta nilamƒÅvatu Ira·πá·π≠ƒÅyirappererikku va·π≠akku cerikku mekku nan=ta vƒÅnatti·πükku ki·∏ªakku E·πüu
cevakan yo·π≠ayatukku te·πükku ki·∏ªakku me·πüku mukkol va·∏ªi vi·π≠·π≠u nilam A·πüumƒÅvum Iravi≈õva ramu·π≠aiyƒÅr koyilukku va·π≠akku tevatƒÅ·πâam AraikkƒÅl nikki nilam A·πüumƒÅvum ƒÄka Innilam Ira·πá·π≠a·πüumƒÅvum vi·πüThe rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 7.748 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
